archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) - Adapted for B2B Trust and Functionality

design_philosophy.core_principle: Functionality First, Trust Always. Clean fintech dashboard inspired by Mercury and Wise. Eliminate friction, highlight transparency, and optimize for data clarity.
anti_patterns: No crypto aesthetics, no Web3 jargon, no dark-tech-mint, no full-screen gradients.
No center-aligned text for data or dense content.
Avoid heavy drop shadows; use 1px borders for structure.

numbers.usage: Use tabular-nums for all currency, dates, timers, and metrics to prevent horizontal shifting.

spacing_and_layout.card_style: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Use The 'Control Room' Grid (Mode B): Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Use 12-column grids on desktop, stacking to 1-column on mobile. Ensure vertical rhythm.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense data, labels, inputs. Center only standalone status messages or empty states.

components.strategy: Use customized Shadcn UI components heavily optimized for the provided color palette.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A1E3F] text-white hover:bg-[#0A1E3F]/90 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F4F7FB] text-[#0A1E3F] hover:bg-[#E2E8F0] rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.accent: bg-[#22A7F0] text-white hover:bg-[#22A7F0]/90 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors

components.cards: Flat background (#FFFFFF), 1px solid border (#E2E8F0), no heavy drop shadow. Internal padding must be generous (p-6).
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Left-aligned columns. Right-aligned for currency amounts. Hover states on rows (hover:bg-[#F4F7FB]). Sticky header for long lists.
components.forms: Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Left-aligned labels. Use clear focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#22A7F0]).
components.badges: Rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium. Success: bg-[#00D2A0]/10 text-[#00D2A0]. Pending: bg-[#FFB800]/10 text-[#FFB800].
components.wizards: Vertical timeline or horizontal step progress bar. Clear active/completed/pending states.

dashboard.layout: 4-column grid for stat cards at top, followed by a 2-column layout (Main table left 8 cols, Quick Actions right 4 cols).
features: 4 Stat Cards: Total Sent, Active Recipients, Pending Transfers, Avg Settlement

send_payout.layout: Centered narrow container (max-w-3xl) to maintain focus.
features: Live currency conversion display (MYR to PHP)
Quote countdown timer (tabular-nums, warning colors when < 10s)
Confetti animation on success using react-confetti

recipients.layout: Responsive grid layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 or 4).

features: Drag-and-drop CSV upload zone with dashed border

login.layout: Split screen or centered card on light background.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Subtle background color shifts on tables and buttons. Slight lift (-translate-y-0.5) on recipient cards.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' for standard interactions.
motion_and_interaction.loading: Use skeleton loaders for data fetching. No full-page spinners.
motion_and_interaction.success: Confetti on successful payment. Use react-confetti library, trigger on reaching final wizard step.

icons.usage: Use icons for clear visual hierarchy on buttons, sidebar, and status indicators.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-primary (#1A202C) and text-muted (#718096) have sufficient contrast against surface (#FFFFFF) and background (#F4F7FB).
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings.
accessibility.test_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='send-payout-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the provided color palette. Do not invent new colors or gradients.
Implement the 5 required pages: Dashboard, Send Payout, Transfers, Recipients, Batch Payouts, plus Login.
In the Send Payout flow, implement a quote countdown timer displaying live conversion (MYR to PHP) and a 5-stage payment progress timeline.
Ensure 'tabular-nums' is applied to all numeric data (timers, currencies, table data).
Use standard Tailwind classes + Shadcn UI components. Ensure all components use the design system's exact HEX codes.
Include 'react-confetti' for the success state in the payment wizard.
Make sure all grid items are direct children of grid containers.
Inject the provided avatar URLs for recipient cards and tables to avoid placeholder images.
